articles.title: Asia stocks fall as tech loses ground; S.Korea, Japan set for strong Feb gains - Investing.com
articles.description: Asia stocks fall as tech loses ground; S.Korea, Japan set for strong Feb gains
articles.content: Investing.com-- Most Asian stocks fell on Friday with technology shares tracking overnight weakness in their Wall Street peers, although bourses in South Korea and Japan were headed for strong gains … [+3101 chars]
